history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A low-angle, wide-angle shot captures a young woman wearing a beige hijab and a long-sleeved beige dress with a knot detail at the waist. She stands in a narrow, minimalist room with walls painted a muted blue-grey. The floor is made of wooden planks. The lighting is soft and diffused, creating a slightly ethereal and contemplative mood. The woman is looking directly at the camera with a gentle expression. She is holding a small black object in her right hand, partially visible at the bottom right of the frame. The composition emphasizes the woman against the stark, almost abstract backdrop, with a fisheye lens effect that distorts the lines of the room. The color palette is dominated by muted tones of beige and blue-grey, with the warm wood floor providing a subtle contrast. The overall style is modern and clean, with a touch of artistic drama due to the perspective and lighting.
